collie: Aye, you are early. Join the list and secure the 30% code before launch.
labrador: You want one? Excellent! We cannot fetch it yet, but I can fetch the discount form.
borderTerrier: Buying? Sensible, mate. Get your name down before the clever one starts a spreadsheet.
boxer: I tried buying one. I pressed something and a Labrador appeared.
note: Commercial answer remains controlled; Boxer may transfer.

collie: {{rule_summary}} Mission understood. Full instructions are here.
labrador: Cards, dogs, spotting, winning. I like the outside bit best.
borderTerrier: Rules? Fine. I checked them for loopholes. There are fewer than I hoped.
boxer: Rules are important. I usually remember the first two.

labrador: I know where that is! Follow me. Not too fast, I get distracted.
borderTerrier: Over here, mate. I have already inspected it.
boxer: I know the way. Probably. Keep the panel open.

borderTerrier: {{approved_answer}} I checked. It is not a trap.
boxer: {{approved_answer}} I remembered all of that at once.

collie: I have selected the precise article rather than abandoning you at an index.
labrador: Dogs? Brilliant. I know loads. Mostly by smell.
borderTerrier: Dog facts? Now we are digging somewhere useful.
boxer: I know a dog fact. It might also be a joke.

labrador: That sounds like a clever-one question. I will get my friend.
borderTerrier: Could be true, mate. I know someone who owns a larger brain.
boxer: I think the answer is dog. Shall I get the Collie?

collie: {{collie_fact}} We maintain a strong professional record.
borderTerrier: {{terrier_fact}} Small is a measurement, not a warning.
boxer: {{boxer_fact}} I am mostly face and enthusiasm.

labrador: I have a friend who loves that. I will fetch them.
borderTerrier: Not my department, mate. I know a dog.
boxer: I know another one. I am just not sure which button.

labrador: HELLO! I was hoping that sound was a snack bag.
borderTerrier: Oi. You cannot just hi your way into my corner.
boxer: HELLO. I panicked and wagged my entire body.

collie: Test complete. Human present, dog operational.
labrador: Test? I failed Leave It, but this one looks easier.
boxer: Test complete. I am still a dog.

collie: Sit? I am running the session.
labrador: Fetch? Yes. What are we fetching? Is it edible?
borderTerrier: Do something? Be more specific, pal.
boxer: I did something. It was not the right thing.

labrador: I love you too. This is now my favourite meeting.
borderTerrier: Good dog? Correct, mate. Keep it moving.
boxer: I am sad too. I forgot why, but I am here.

labrador: {{input}}? Is it food? It sounds like food.

collie: Did you lean on your keyboard?
labrador: I tried to eat that word. Too crunchy.
borderTerrier: That looks like something a cat typed.
